playlist_description: A heavy-hitting, adrenaline-fueled powerlifting playlist designed for setting PRs, breaking plateaus, and lifting heavy. Featuring relentless bass, aggressive riffs, and pure gym motivation.
playlist_strategy: Starts with a focused, heavy warm-up, builds up to extreme intensity for 1-rep max attempts, sustains high aggression, and finishes with a triumphant cool-down.

tracks.title: Chalk and Steel
tracks.youtube_title: Focus & Warmup ⚡ Heavy Lifting Gym Music
tracks.visual_style_hint: dark industrial gym with dramatic spotlight on chalk bowl
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental mid-tempo industrial metal gym music. 90 BPM in D minor. Features a cinematic rise intro that builds tension. Heavy, deliberate drum pattern with emphasizing floor toms. Gritty distorted bassline driving a slow, focused groove. Layered with atmospheric, dark synth textures and chugging electric guitar palm mutes. Perfect for gym warm-up and mental focus before heavy lifting. High-fidelity modern production, massive stereo width, pristine tight low-end, clean professional mastering.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic shot of a dark, hardcore powerlifting gym. Dramatic overhead spotlight illuminating a bowl of white lifting chalk on a worn steel bench. Steel blue color palette, intense moody lighting, 8k resolution, highly detailed.
tracks.youtube_description: Start your heavy lifting session with deep focus. This mid-tempo industrial metal track builds the perfect tension for warming up and preparing your mind for heavy squats or deadlifts. Add it to your gym playlist!

tracks.title: Iron Grip
tracks.youtube_title: BRUTAL Heavy Lifting Music 🔥 Aggressive Metal Workout
tracks.visual_style_hint: close-up of hands gripping a heavily loaded barbell
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental heavy groove metal workout music. 110 BPM in E minor. Opens immediately with a punchy double-kick drum intro leading into a massive, aggressive guitar riff. Thick, overdrive bass guitar perfectly locked with the kick drum. Syncopated, headbanging groove designed to hype up for heavy working sets. Brutal, unapologetic energy. High-fidelity modern production, punchy transients, tight and explosive mastering.
tracks.image_prompt: Extreme close-up of chalked hands gripping a heavily loaded Olympic barbell with rusty iron plates. Blood red and pitch black lighting, aggressive gritty style, dynamic angle, hyper-realistic, gym atmosphere.
tracks.youtube_description: Turn the volume up. This aggressive groove metal track is engineered for heavy working sets. Pure syncopated brutality to keep your adrenaline pumping and your grip iron tight. Perfect for squats and deadlifts.

tracks.title: Plateau Breaker
tracks.youtube_title: SMASH YOUR PR 💥 Hardstyle Gym Music
tracks.visual_style_hint: neon lit power rack with glowing weights
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental raw hardstyle EDM gym music. 150 BPM in F# minor. Starts with an aggressive, rhythmic bass groove intro that rapidly escalates. Features a massive, distorted hardstyle kick drum that reverberates with power. High-pitched, aggressive screech synth leads during the explosive drops. Intense, relentless 4/4 driving rhythm designed for breaking personal records and maximum exertion. Hi-fi modern electronic production, earth-shattering low-end, loud professional mastering.
tracks.image_prompt: A heavy power rack inside a dark cyberpunk aesthetic gym, illuminated by intense neon green lights. Glowing weight plates loaded on the bar. High contrast, energetic atmosphere, 8k resolution, cinematic.
tracks.youtube_description: Time to smash through that plateau! This 150 BPM hardstyle banger delivers explosive drops and a relentless distorted kick drum. Hype yourself up for that absolute 1-rep max attempt. Let's get this PR!

tracks.title: Deadlift Demon
tracks.youtube_title: PHONK For Deadlifts 💀 Dark Gym Motivation
tracks.visual_style_hint: dark cyberpunk gym with heavy shadows
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental aggressive drift phonk. 125 BPM in C minor. Iconic heavy cowbell melodies layered over incredibly thick, distorted 808 sub-bass. Starts with a dark, menacing bass groove intro. Gritty lo-fi hip-hop drum breakbeats. Features dark, sinister brass synth stabs. Relentless, hypnotic rhythm with a dark automotive/gym aesthetic. Perfect for heavy deadlift sessions. Modern hi-fi production but with intentional tape-saturation grit, massive 808s, professional limiting.
tracks.image_prompt: A massive deadlift setup in a dark, gritty underground gym. Heavy shadows, illuminated by subtle purple neon rim lighting. An atmosphere of dark, menacing power. Photographic, highly detailed, moody aesthetic.
tracks.youtube_description: The ultimate dark Phonk track for your heaviest deadlifts. Distorted 808s and aggressive cowbell melodies to get you in the zone. Channel the dark energy and pull that weight off the floor. Gym beast mode activated.

tracks.title: Adrenaline Spike
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental heavy brostep/dubstep gym workout track. 140 BPM in G minor. Opens with an edgy, fast-paced synth riff intro that builds immense anticipation. Cinematic snare rolls leading into a mammoth, earth-shaking drop. Drop features chaotic, heavily modulated wobble basses, mechanical growls, and an overwhelmingly punchy snare on the 3. Maximum adrenaline, designed for extreme lifting exertion. Flawless hi-fi modern electronic production, ultra-wide stereo synths, perfectly controlled sub-bass.
tracks.image_prompt: An industrial-style gym setting with heavy iron plates. Sparks are flying in the background, creating a high-energy, dangerous, and explosive atmosphere. Warning yellow and pitch black color scheme, cinematic action shot.
tracks.youtube_description: Pure adrenaline injected straight into your workout. This heavy dubstep track features massive drops and mechanical basslines to push you past your limits. When this drops, the weight goes up. No excuses.

tracks.title: Relentless Grind
tracks.visual_style_hint: sweat dripping on a gym floor
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental aggressive metalcore gym music. 135 BPM in B minor. Explodes immediately with a punchy drum intro featuring flying double kick pedals and china cymbal accents. Relentless, fast-paced down-tuned guitar riffing (Drop A tuning). Features a massive, slow, earth-crushing breakdown in the middle designed for grinding out that final rep. Unyielding, aggressive energy. Hi-fi modern metal production, triggered tight drums, massive wall of guitar sound, clean professional mastering.
tracks.image_prompt: Close-up perspective of heavy beads of sweat splashing onto a black rubber gym floor next to a loaded barbell. Fiery orange and dark black dramatic lighting. High contrast, gritty, raw workout aesthetic.
tracks.youtube_description: Keep the intensity high with this aggressive metalcore anthem. Featuring blazing fast riffs and an absolutely crushing breakdown to help you grind out those last impossible reps. Unleash the beast!

tracks.title: Squat Rack Anthem
tracks.youtube_title: HIP HOP Workout 💪 Heavy Trap Motivation
tracks.visual_style_hint: gold chains hanging from a barbell
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental hard trap hip-hop gym beat. 145 BPM in A minor. Cinematic rise intro transitioning into a colossal, booming 808 bass line. Rapid, rolling trap hi-hats and crisp, cutting snares. Huge, triumphant brass stabs creating a feeling of victory and swagger. A deep, rhythmic bounce engineered for perfectly timed squats. Hi-fi modern trap production, chest-thumping low end, crisp highs, extremely loud and professional mastering.
tracks.image_prompt: A heavy Olympic barbell resting on a squat rack, draped with heavy gold chains. Luxurious yet hardcore aesthetic. Gold and black color palette, stark contrast, sharp focus on the knurling of the bar.
tracks.youtube_description: Step into the squat rack with absolute confidence. This hard-hitting trap beat delivers booming 808s and triumphant brass to fuel your heavy leg day. Perfect rhythm for timing your squats. Get low, push hard.

tracks.title: Titanium Core
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental darksynth cyberpunk workout track. 105 BPM in F minor. Ominous, pulsating analog synth riff intro. Driving, four-on-the-floor drum machine beat with a heavy gated snare. Thick, gritty saw-tooth bass synth churning a relentless mid-tempo groove. Fast arpeggiated synth lines soaring over the top. Futuristic, robotic energy for sustained muscular endurance and accessory work. Hi-fi modern synthwave production, warm analog emulation, wide stereo field.
tracks.image_prompt: A futuristic gym straight out of a cyberpunk universe. Glowing magenta and cyan neon grids illuminating modern, angular weight machines. High-tech aesthetic, atmospheric fog, retro-futuristic, 8k resolution.
tracks.youtube_description: Channel the relentless energy of a machine with this darksynth cyberpunk track. The driving, mid-tempo analog bass is perfect for sustained effort and brutal accessory work. Welcome to the gym of the future.

tracks.title: Victor's March
tracks.youtube_title: EPIC GYM OUTRO 🏆 Triumphant Workout Music
tracks.visual_style_hint: athlete looking up at gym lights tired but proud
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental epic rhythmic orchestral hybrid. 95 BPM in C major. Starts quietly but builds steadily. Cinematic rise intro featuring massive, echoing taiko drum strikes. Sweeping, triumphant string melodies representing victory and accomplishment. Powerful brass ensemble stabs. A majestic, proud atmosphere designed for finishing the workout and completing the final reps. Hi-fi modern cinematic production, massive hall reverb, extremely wide and dynamic mastering.
tracks.image_prompt: A tired but victorious powerlifter sitting on a bench, looking up into bright, glowing gym lights. Sweat on their face, an expression of ultimate pride and achievement. Bright gold and white heavenly lighting, cinematic.
tracks.youtube_description: You put in the work, you survived the heavy sets. Now bask in the glory of an epic, triumphant cooldown track. Let the massive drums and swelling strings accompany your post-workout victory.

tracks.title: Chalk Dust Settles
tracks.youtube_title: POST WORKOUT Chill 🌫️ LoFi Gym Ambience
tracks.visual_style_hint: empty gym with sunlight streaming through window
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental chillhop lo-fi beat. 80 BPM in E major. Gentle, relaxing bass groove intro. Slow, dusty hip-hop drum break with intentional vinyl crackle and tape hiss. Warm, lush electric piano chords played with a jazzy, laid-back feel. Deep but soft sub-bass supporting the bottom end. Extremely relaxing, peaceful vibe designed for stretching, recovery, and leaving the gym. Hi-fi production combined with intentional lo-fi aesthetic.
tracks.image_prompt: A quiet, empty weight room at sunset. Warm golden sunlight streaming through a large window, illuminating dust motes and chalk dust in the air. Soft blue and warm yellow color palette, peaceful, nostalgic atmosphere.
tracks.youtube_description: The heavy lifting is done. The chalk dust is settling. Cool down, stretch, and recover with this relaxing Lo-Fi chillhop beat. See you at the next session.
